title: Group-wise Threshold Effects in a Global Deep Learning Fire Danger Prediction Model: Code and Audit Outputs
description: Code, documentation, and processed audit outputs supporting the manuscript on group-wise threshold effects in a global ConvLSTM large-fire danger model (2002-2020). Includes Fairlearn-based group metrics, threshold optimization scripts, Integrated Gradients workflow, manuscript figures, audit CSV tables, plot reproduction cache, and the best-model checkpoint metadata. Full raw geospatial training tensors are not redistributed; see data/README.md for upstream sources.
notes: Data outputs derived by the authors (CSV, plot cache) are recommended CC-BY-4.0 where applicable; upstream Earth observation products retain their original licences.
